days.summary: Work focused on browser automation planning, UI polish, navigation cleanup, and repository-aware code editor improvements. The day also included component styling refinements and broader shared hook/state maintenance.
frontendChangeBullets: Refined navigation and sidebar behavior so moving across ORGII feels clearer and more predictable.
Polished shared UI components, including buttons, colors, menus, and form controls for a more consistent interface.
Improved code review and editor views with clearer diffs, search, and file navigation.
Cleaned route and tab behavior so users encounter fewer surprising navigation jumps.
Advanced browser automation planning surfaces, helping prepare web-driven workflows for future interaction.
backendChangeBullets: Improved repository-aware code editor foundations so file navigation can better reflect the active repo.
Maintained shared hooks and state used by navigation, editor, and workflow surfaces.
Cleaned route and tab data structures behind predictable navigation behavior.
Improved browser automation planning infrastructure without exposing unfinished user flows.
Strengthened component styling foundations that downstream UI modules rely on.

days.summary: The application gained the next phases of web extension management, a select-repo page, route fallback improvements, and simulator compact mode. UI panels and API-call views were also simplified for better structure and styling consistency.
frontendChangeBullets: Advanced web extension management with clearer compatibility messages for users.
Added a select-repo page so users can choose the workspace context before continuing.
Improved route fallback behavior to keep navigation from landing on confusing blank states.
Added compact simulator mode for a denser review experience.
Simplified UI panels and API-call views for better structure and styling consistency.
backendChangeBullets: Expanded extension management plumbing for workspace integration and compatibility checks.
Improved route fallback handling behind the app navigation system.
Connected repository selection state into the select-repo flow.
Cleaned API-call view data handling to make request details easier to present.
Adjusted simulator state support for compact mode presentation.

days.summary: Work advanced web extension support and VS Code-like workspace behavior, including sticky scroll in Explorer and terminal UI enhancements. There was also cleanup around extension compatibility messaging and CodeMirror documentation.
frontendChangeBullets: Advanced web extension support with more workspace-like behavior.
Added sticky scroll behavior in Explorer, bringing navigation closer to familiar editor experiences.
Enhanced terminal UI with clearer controls and embedded workflow support.
Improved extension compatibility messaging so unsupported or partial cases are easier to understand.
Updated CodeMirror documentation and editor-related guidance for clearer maintainability.
backendChangeBullets: Expanded extension integration support for VS Code-like workspace behavior.
Improved Explorer state handling behind sticky scroll behavior.
Strengthened terminal UI data flow and embedded workflow state.
Cleaned compatibility-message logic used by extension surfaces.
Updated editor documentation around CodeMirror usage and behavior.

days.summary: A major localization pass expanded settings, marketplace, sidebar, terminology, and multilingual UI coverage. Alongside i18n work, session state, navigation, and shared component areas continued to receive incremental refinements.
frontendChangeBullets: Expanded localization across settings, marketplace, sidebar, and navigation surfaces.
Improved terminology consistency so user-facing labels are clearer across the product.
Refined navigation and sidebar behavior alongside multilingual text updates.
Improved marketplace and model browsing text so listings and account setup are easier to understand.
Updated settings configuration screens with broader translated coverage.
backendChangeBullets: Updated i18n resources across supported languages for settings, marketplace, and navigation.
Improved session state maintenance while localization changes touched session-facing surfaces.
Cleaned shared component text keys to reduce duplicate or inconsistent labels.
Updated navigation resource wiring behind sidebar and route labels.
Maintained marketplace and settings data labels used by localized UI rendering.

days.summary: Session management was refactored around new atoms and hooks while terminal rendering moved toward TerminalInteractive. The day also removed unused rich editor/designer components and added more localized tooltips and UI text.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved session management UI around new atoms and hooks for more consistent session state.
Moved terminal rendering toward TerminalInteractive for richer command interaction.
Removed unused rich editor and designer components, simplifying visible product surfaces.
Added more localized tooltips and UI text across session and terminal areas.
Improved Git and repository status presentation so project context feels fresher.
backendChangeBullets: Refactored session management around new atoms and hooks.
Advanced terminal rendering infrastructure toward TerminalInteractive.
Removed unused rich editor and designer code paths from the frontend runtime.
Updated localization resources for tooltips and session-facing UI text.
Improved Git status data paths used by session and project context displays.

days.summary: The codebase continued broad UI consolidation: StatusBar state was unified, SVG icons were updated for theming, ActionCard and ModelIcon were standardized, and marketplace routing moved toward Token Market terminology. Localization and profile components also received significant updates.
frontendChangeBullets: Unified StatusBar state so status indicators behave more consistently across the app.
Updated SVG icons for better theming in light and dark contexts.
Standardized ActionCard and ModelIcon behavior for more consistent provider and action presentation.
Moved marketplace routing toward Token Market terminology in user-facing flows.
Updated profile components and localization for clearer account-related experiences.
backendChangeBullets: Consolidated StatusBar state handling behind shared UI surfaces.
Updated SVG asset handling to support theme-aware icon rendering.
Standardized ActionCard and ModelIcon configuration used across product modules.
Adjusted marketplace route data and naming toward Token Market terminology.
Updated localization resources and profile component data dependencies.

days.summary: Collaboration and project-related areas were reorganized, including WebRTC integration work, Projects cleanup, and a TaskTracker API proxy. A large localization pass added timezone, country, and related UI keys.
frontendChangeBullets: Reorganized collaboration and project-related areas for clearer access to team and project workflows.
Improved WebRTC integration surfaces supporting collaboration features.
Cleaned Projects UI so project-related screens are easier to navigate.
Added timezone and country localization keys for more complete profile and settings experiences.
Improved collaboration messaging and project labels across localized UI.
backendChangeBullets: Added TaskTracker API proxy support for project-related workflows.
Advanced WebRTC integration work behind collaboration features.
Cleaned Projects service and data organization.
Expanded localization data for timezone, country, and related UI keys.
Updated project and collaboration data flows to match reorganized frontend areas.

days.summary: Caching and session handling were improved, while GitOperationsService was modularized and documented. UI cleanup included removing unnecessary lint suppressions and expanding workflow localization.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved workflow editing localization so action-management controls are clearer in more languages.
Cleaned unnecessary lint suppressions from UI code, improving maintainability without changing user behavior.
Improved session handling so user context is steadier across app flows.
Refined workflow layout and branching presentation through localized labels.
Improved core product reliability around cached session and workflow state.
backendChangeBullets: Improved caching behavior used by session and workflow features.
Modularized GitOperationsService for clearer repository-operation ownership.
Documented GitOperationsService behavior for easier maintenance.
Cleaned lint suppressions from code paths that no longer needed exceptions.
Improved session handling internals that support cached app state.

days.summary: OS Agent and code-session boundaries were clarified with a new OS Agent module and separated session system. Git commit detail views, code font unification, and broad localization/UX improvements were added across navigation and session surfaces.
frontendChangeBullets: Clarified OS Agent and code-session boundaries with a dedicated OS Agent module.
Separated OS Agent sessions from code sessions so users see clearer session categories.
Improved Git commit detail views for richer source-control inspection.
Unified code font usage across editor and review surfaces.
Expanded localization and UX polish across navigation and session screens.
backendChangeBullets: Added a dedicated OS Agent module to separate agent responsibilities.
Separated OS Agent session handling from code-session infrastructure.
Updated session system boundaries so routing and state can distinguish agent categories.
Improved data support for Git commit detail views.
Cleaned session and localization data paths touched by the new OS Agent structure.

days.summary: OS Agent architecture and terminal integration were expanded, while the frontend removed its legacy Python server dependency. Git blame, documentation navigation, input styling tokens, and direct API key provider support also landed.
frontendChangeBullets: Expanded OS Agent architecture and terminal integration in session-facing screens.
Removed the frontend dependency on a legacy Python server, simplifying the app experience.
Added Git blame presentation for deeper source context in editor flows.
Improved documentation navigation so users can find reference material more easily.
Updated input styling tokens and direct key provider setup surfaces.
backendChangeBullets: Expanded OS Agent runtime architecture and terminal integration paths.
Removed reliance on the legacy Python server from frontend runtime flows.
Added support for Git blame data in source-control features.
Added direct API key provider support behind account configuration.
Updated documentation navigation data and input styling token foundations.

days.summary: Project Manager routing and UI infrastructure were introduced while shared primitives such as TabPill and Placeholder were refined. The day was dominated by broad styling, component consistency, and localization maintenance across a high volume of commits.
frontendChangeBullets: Introduced Project Manager routing for clearer access to project workflows.
Added Project Manager UI infrastructure as a foundation for richer planning screens.
Refined shared TabPill behavior for more consistent tab-like controls.
Improved Placeholder components so empty and loading states feel more polished.
Applied broad styling and localization maintenance across a high volume of user-facing areas.
backendChangeBullets: Added route definitions and lazy-loading support for Project Manager areas.
Updated UI infrastructure backing Project Manager state and navigation.
Refined shared component primitives used by tabs and placeholder states.
Cleaned styling and component consistency across shared modules.
Updated localization resources supporting Project Manager and related navigation labels.

days.summary: Settings gained a VS Code-style JSONC-backed system, and OS Agent session tooling was connected through frontend services. Workspace scanning became configurable, and file/git actions were extended with more structured data.
frontendChangeBullets: Added a VS Code-style JSONC-backed settings system with both GUI and JSON editing paths.
Connected OS Agent session tooling through frontend services for clearer agent controls.
Made workspace scanning configurable from settings surfaces.
Extended file and Git actions with more structured information in the UI.
Improved settings screens so saved controls feel clearer and more reliable.
backendChangeBullets: Added JSONC-backed settings storage and service support.
Connected OS Agent session tooling through frontend service wrappers.
Added configurable workspace scanning support.
Extended file and Git action payloads with structured data.
Updated settings persistence and retrieval paths used by GUI and JSON editors.

days.summary: Browser automation features were implemented, CLI session resume and proxy model alias behavior were fixed, and chat block rendering was consolidated. Session runtime observability improved through token usage tracking, mid-session model switching, and real-time terminal streaming.
frontendChangeBullets: Implemented browser automation features for smoother embedded browsing workflows.
Fixed CLI session resume behavior in user-facing session flows.
Consolidated chat block rendering so messages, actions, and status blocks feel more consistent.
Added token usage tracking visibility for better session observability.
Enabled mid-session model switching and improved real-time terminal streaming.
backendChangeBullets: Implemented browser automation runtime support behind embedded browser workflows.
Fixed CLI session resume handling.
Corrected proxy model alias behavior in session runtime paths.
Added token usage tracking for session observability.
Improved real-time terminal streaming and model-switching support during active sessions.

days.summary: OS Agent settings gained a tools section, channel integration management was added, and memory/search tooling expanded. The day also included drag-and-drop improvements, CodeAccountWizard localization cleanup, and Rust lint fixes.
frontendChangeBullets: Added a tools section to OS Agent settings so capabilities are easier to inspect and configure.
Added channel integration management for clearer connected-service setup.
Expanded memory and search tooling surfaces in agent settings.
Improved drag-and-drop interactions across relevant configuration and workflow areas.
Cleaned CodeAccountWizard localization so account setup reads more consistently.
backendChangeBullets: Expanded OS Agent settings data to include tools configuration.
Added channel integration management support.
Improved memory and search tooling integration behind agent settings.
Applied Rust lint fixes for cleaner backend code.
Updated account wizard localization resources and drag-and-drop state handling.

days.summary: Settings and integrations terminology was cleaned up, including the move from market namespace toward integrations and the user-facing Keys & Integrations label. Diff rendering was extracted into smaller pieces, and channel integration probing was improved.
frontendChangeBullets: Cleaned settings and integrations terminology so labels are easier to understand.
Updated user-facing naming toward Keys & Integrations for account and provider setup.
Extracted diff rendering into smaller pieces for clearer code review views.
Improved settings screens with more reliable terminology and localized labels.
Refined integrations areas so connected services feel more coherent.
backendChangeBullets: Improved channel integration probing behind integrations settings.
Cleaned integration namespace usage supporting settings and account surfaces.
Refactored diff-rendering code into smaller maintainable pieces.
Updated localization resources for Keys & Integrations terminology.
Improved settings and integration data paths to match the updated naming.

days.summary: Documentation was reorganized into a category-based structure while outdated architecture and agent docs were removed. SessionService gained coding-agent session support, and API exports were cleaned up alongside Rust agent core updates.
frontendChangeBullets: Reorganized documentation into category-based structure for easier browsing.
Removed outdated architecture and agent documents from visible reference areas.
Added support for coding-agent sessions in session-facing product flows.
Cleaned API exports so service boundaries are easier to follow.
Improved service structure around sessions and agent-facing UI.
backendChangeBullets: Added coding-agent session support in SessionService.
Updated Rust agent core code alongside session service changes.
Cleaned API exports to reduce stale service entry points.
Removed outdated documentation artifacts that no longer matched current architecture.
Improved service organization behind session and agent runtime support.

days.summary: Agent terminology shifted from Coding Agent to SDE Agent, and OS Agent settings gained ATC, MCP server, and skills sections. ORGII pool frontend work and model configuration redesigns continued with synchronized localization.
frontendChangeBullets: Updated agent terminology from Coding Agent to SDE Agent in user-facing areas.
Added ATC, MCP server, and skills sections to OS Agent settings.
Continued ORGII pool frontend work with clearer opt-in and configuration surfaces.
Redesigned model configuration screens for better account and model visibility.
Synchronized localization with updated agent and settings terminology.
backendChangeBullets: Updated agent terminology in configuration and session data paths.
Added settings support for ATC, MCP server, and skills sections.
Improved model configuration data handling behind redesigned screens.
Updated ORGII pool support paths used by frontend opt-in flows.
Refreshed localization resources tied to agent settings and model configuration.

days.summary: Model configuration and account visibility were tightened: disabled models/accounts were filtered, pool opt-in UI was made consistent, and analytics display logic distinguished local token usage from cloud cost.
frontendChangeBullets: Filtered disabled models from model configuration views so users see only actionable choices.
Filtered disabled accounts to reduce clutter in account selection.
Made pool opt-in UI more consistent across ORGII-related settings.
Improved analytics display logic to distinguish local token usage from cloud cost.
Polished account and provider setup screens with clearer visibility rules.
backendChangeBullets: Added filtering logic for disabled models and accounts.
Improved model configuration data handling for account visibility.
Updated pool opt-in state behavior for consistent ORGII settings.
Adjusted analytics data presentation logic separating local token usage from cloud cost.
Updated localization resources connected to model and account configuration.

days.summary: ATC setup became more complete with persistent add-panel visibility, more action/input renderers, repo scope selection, and clearer wizard step presentation. ATC was also moved into the main app view mode with home sidebar access.
frontendChangeBullets: Made ATC setup more complete with persistent add-panel visibility.
Added more ATC action and input renderers for clearer workflow construction.
Added repo scope selection so ATC setup can target the intended repository context.
Improved wizard step presentation for a clearer setup sequence.
Moved ATC into the main app view mode with Home sidebar access.
backendChangeBullets: Persisted ATC add-panel visibility state.
Added action and input renderer support for ATC configuration data.
Connected repository scope selection into ATC setup state.
Updated routing so ATC can run as a main app view mode.
Added sidebar access wiring for ATC entry from Home.

days.summary: ATC received app-launcher/start-page entry points and simpler action item presentation. Property panel dropdowns gained search and height limits, and documentation expanded around evolver integration and cross-agent learning concepts.
frontendChangeBullets: Added ATC entry points from the app launcher and start page.
Simplified ATC action item presentation so workflows are easier to scan.
Added search to property panel dropdowns for faster option selection.
Added height limits to property panel dropdowns to prevent oversized menus.
Expanded documentation around evolver integration and cross-agent learning concepts.
backendChangeBullets: Updated app-launcher and start-page route wiring for ATC.
Simplified ATC action item data presentation paths.
Added searchable dropdown state support in property panels.
Added dropdown sizing constraints across property panel components.
Expanded internal documentation for evolver integration and cross-agent learning concepts.

days.summary: Billing and subscription behavior moved toward backend-driven configuration, while ORGII subscription UI added wallet earned/purchased credit concepts. ORGII project settings gained work items, project data hooks, push retry behavior, and failure indicators.
frontendChangeBullets: Moved billing and subscription behavior toward backend-driven configuration for more accurate plan display.
Added ORGII subscription UI concepts for earned and purchased wallet credit.
Improved Work Items and project settings with richer planning surfaces.
Added push retry feedback and failure indicators for project settings workflows.
Expanded localization around wallet, billing, subscription, and project settings text.
backendChangeBullets: Added backend-driven billing and subscription configuration support.
Updated wallet data handling for earned and purchased credit concepts.
Added project data hooks used by ORGII project settings.
Improved push retry behavior in project settings workflows.
Added failure indicator data paths for project and Work Item synchronization.

days.summary: Project synchronization and localization strings were refined, with repeated member commit count updates. Kiro ACP support was added through a shared protocol implementation, extending session and integration capabilities.
frontendChangeBullets: Refined project synchronization status messaging for clearer feedback.
Updated localization strings across project and synchronization surfaces.
Improved member commit count presentation with repeated accuracy updates.
Added Kiro ACP support visibility through shared session and integration capabilities.
Polished shared app behavior across sessions, navigation, and project workflows.
backendChangeBullets: Refined project synchronization data handling.
Updated member commit count calculations and related sync data.
Added Kiro ACP support through a shared protocol implementation.
Extended session and integration capabilities for the new ACP support.
Updated localization resources tied to project sync and Kiro integration text.

days.summary: ORGII platform constants were cleaned up by replacing hardcoded orchestrator strings. Project sync status became more accurate, and network settings gained Git proxy and VPN detection features with localization support.
frontendChangeBullets: Cleaned ORGII platform labels by replacing hardcoded orchestrator strings with consistent product naming.
Improved project sync status accuracy in project-facing screens.
Added Git proxy settings so repository network behavior is easier to configure.
Added VPN detection features in network settings.
Expanded localization support for network, Git proxy, VPN, and project sync labels.
backendChangeBullets: Replaced hardcoded orchestrator strings with shared ORGII platform constants.
Improved project sync status calculation and state reporting.
Added Git proxy configuration support.
Added VPN detection support for network settings.

days.summary: Agent settings and integrations were improved with a shared SaveableTextarea, disk usage monitoring, Git provider integration, Git proxy editing, and a unified wallet top-up panel. Localization updates accompanied most user-facing changes.
frontendChangeBullets: Improved agent settings and integrations with a shared SaveableTextarea component.
Added disk usage monitoring to help users understand local resource consumption.
Added Git provider integration and Git proxy editing in settings surfaces.
Added a unified wallet top-up panel for clearer account funding flows.
Updated localization for the new settings, wallet, and integration changes.

days.summary: Session management and source-control interactions were enhanced, including right-click context menus and clearer Git diff stat naming. ProjectManager bugs were fixed around stale closures and async cancellation, while model configuration localization continued.
frontendChangeBullets: Enhanced session management interactions with right-click context menus.
Improved source-control naming by making Git diff stat labels clearer.
Fixed Project Manager UI issues caused by stale closures and async cancellation problems.
Continued model configuration localization for clearer account and model labels.
Improved code review and editor views with clearer source-control context.

days.summary: Work item history tracking landed, user message editing was added, and placeholder/inline state components were unified. Localization duplicates were consolidated across all locales, and member/history surfaces received UI polish.
frontendChangeBullets: Added Work Item history tracking so planning changes can be reviewed over time.
Added user message editing for more flexible chat correction.
Unified placeholder and inline state components for more consistent empty and loading states.
Consolidated duplicate localization entries across all supported locales.
Polished member and history surfaces for clearer project collaboration context.
backendChangeBullets: Added Work Item history tracking data support.
Added user message editing support in session/chat state.

days.summary: Integrations gained forms and support for additional messaging channels, while subagent loading and event handling were implemented. Project Manager added Members, Repo Settings, and My Profile sections, with related GitHub connection localization updates.

Improved settings screens for Project Manager Members, Repo Settings, and My Profile sections.
Added subagent loading states so users get clearer feedback while agent data initializes.
Updated GitHub connection localization for clearer provider setup text.
Improved app startup and loading states across integrations and project areas.

days.summary: Work item sync feedback was tightened so changes immediately show a pending state, improving responsiveness around project synchronization.

Made planning views feel more reliable by reflecting sync state right away.
